title: Senior Doctor - Merck India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Merck India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Merck India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
